criteria_verification.criterion_text: All validation rules from DM-agent-config.md enforced via Pydantic validators
criteria_verification.evidence: All validation rules implemented: max_turns >= 1 (Field ge=1 + field_validator), chunk_size > 0 (Field gt=0), overlap >= 0 and < chunk_size (Field ge=0 + model_validator), level must be DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR (field_validator), format must be 'json' (field_validator per ADR-ARCH-007).
